itemNotFound: The requested item does not exist.
runNotFound: The requested run does not exist.
reviewDraftUnsupportedItem: Review drafts are only supported for GitHub pull request and GitLab merge request runs.
invalidImplementationDraftBinding: Implementation draft is missing its run binding.
followUpDraftNotFound: The requested follow-up draft does not exist.
followUpDraftUnsupportedRun: Follow-up drafts can only be submitted for Oratorio AppServer runs.
discussionTurnNotFound: The requested Agent Discussion Turn does not exist.
invalidTransition: Only failed source writes can be retried.
emptyDiff: Implementation draft cannot be delivered because the managed worktree has no diff.
